scripts.build:web: web/node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc -b web/tsconfig.json && web/node_modules/.bin/vite build web --config web/vite.config.ts
scripts.rebuild: web/node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc -b web/tsconfig.json && web/node_modules/.bin/vite build web --config web/vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:test: bun run rebuild && bun run nine1bot
